HGSS.141.0001:
You are...!
It is indeed you, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Outstanding!
Quite an achievement for you\r
to come up here, bud!\f
HGSS.141.0002:
This is the “Friendship” room.\f
It was built to commemorate the
solidarity, trust, and potential\r
of Pokémon and people and\r
to hope for the eternal friendship\r
between Pokémon and people.\f
HGSS.141.0003:
Congratulations!\f
This room is only for those true
Pokéathletes who have earned\r
real friendships with Pokémon!\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
You are a true Pokéathlete, bud!\f
HGSS.141.0004:
Having said that...
this is also the moment\r
of a new beginning...\f
HGSS.141.0005:
That’s right, bud!
You have just heard a new starting\r
signal. Your challenge continues\r
for a whole new height and to become\r
the legendary Pokéathlete!\f
Take a look at this statue.
You may be looking at your goal...\f
HGSS.141.0006:
Magnus: This is the “Friendship” room.
It is the last of all. It’s the room\r
where eternal friendship between\r
people and Pokémon is pledged.\f
...But this is not your goal, bud.\f
Each room has Trophies to earn,
but you can aim for any new height.\f
It is entirely up to you whether
you get there or not...\f
That’s right!\f
Your true goal is not something
anyone else can decide for you, bud.\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
You can overcome any difficulties\r
with your friendship with your Pokémon.
HGSS.141.0008:
The statue of the Pokémon
you’ve shared your journey\r
with, helping each other and\r
cultivating your friendship!
HGSS.141.0009:
It is the statue of a Medalist Pokémon.\f
Do you want to replace it with another?
HGSS.141.0010:
You can place a statue of a
Medalist Pokémon that has\r
earned five medals.\f
Do you want to place a statue?
HGSS.141.0011:
It is the statue of a Medalist Pokémon.\f
Do you want to replace it with another?
HGSS.141.0012:
You can place a statue of a
Medalist Pokémon that has\r
earned five medals.\f
Do you want to place a statue?

It is the statue of a Medalist Pokémon.\f
